[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100011 3
1 1001100 3
2 0111011 5
3 1111111 a
4 1010010 3
5 1111111 a
6 1011111 6
7 0111110 5

01 0000000 a
12 0000101 2
23 1010000 2
34 0000010 1
45 0000001 1
56 0101100 3
67 1000000 1
70 0101000 2

02 0000000 a
13 1010101 4
24 0010010 2
35 0000000 a
46 0100001 2
57 1000100 2
60 0000000 a
71 0101000 2

03 1010000 2
14 0010110 3
25 0000000 a
36 0100000 1
47 1000001 2
50 0101100 3
61 0000000 a
72 0101000 2

04 0010010 2
15 0000001 1
26 0000000 a
37 0000000 a
40 0100001 2
51 0101000 2
62 0000000 a
73 0011000 2

05 0000000 a
16 0000101 2
27 1000000 1
30 0100000 1
41 0100000 1
52 0101100 3
63 1010000 2
74 0011010 3

06 0000000 a
17 1000101 3
20 0000000 a
31 0100000 1
42 0100001 2
53 1011100 4
64 0010010 2
75 0000000 a

07 1000000 1
10 0000101 2
21 0000000 a
32 0100000 1
43 1000001 2
54 0011110 4
65 0000000 a
76 0101000 2
